user.title: Moj Elektro
user.description: Enter your Moj Elektro API token.

add_usage_point.title: Add usage point
add_usage_point.description: Enter the identifikator (short form, e.g. 4-1234567) or the 18-digit GSRN of the meter.

configure_measurements.title: Configure measurements
configure_measurements.description: For {naziv} ({identifikator}) — pick any combination of Statistics and InfluxDB per reading type. Leaving a row empty skips it.

data.A_PLUS_15MIN: Active energy received, A+ (15 min, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_15MIN: Active energy delivered, A- (15 min, kWh)
data.R_PLUS_15MIN: Reactive energy received, R+ (15 min, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_15MIN: Reactive energy delivered, R- (15 min, kVArh)
data.P_PLUS_15MIN: Active power received, P+ (15 min, kW)
data.P_MINUS_15MIN: Active power delivered, P- (15 min, kW)
data.Q_PLUS_15MIN: Reactive power received, Q+ (15 min, kVAr)
data.Q_MINUS_15MIN: Reactive power delivered, Q- (15 min, kVAr)
data.A_PLUS_T0_DAILY: Active energy received, A+ — total (ET) (daily meter total, kWh)
data.A_PLUS_T1_DAILY: Active energy received, A+ — high tariff (VT) (daily meter total, kWh)
data.A_PLUS_T2_DAILY: Active energy received, A+ — low tariff (MT) (daily meter total, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_T0_DAILY: Active energy delivered, A- — total (ET) (daily meter total, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_T1_DAILY: Active energy delivered, A- — high tariff (VT) (daily meter total, kWh)
data.A_MINUS_T2_DAILY: Active energy delivered, A- — low tariff (MT) (daily meter total, kWh)
data.R_PLUS_T0_DAILY: Reactive energy received, R+ — total (ET) (daily meter total, kVArh)
data.R_PLUS_T1_DAILY: Reactive energy received, R+ — high tariff (VT) (daily meter total, kVArh)
data.R_PLUS_T2_DAILY: Reactive energy received, R+ — low tariff (MT) (daily meter total, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_T0_DAILY: Reactive energy delivered, R- — total (ET) (daily meter total, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_T1_DAILY: Reactive energy delivered, R- — high tariff (VT) (daily meter total, kVArh)
data.R_MINUS_T2_DAILY: Reactive energy delivered, R- — low tariff (MT) (daily meter total, kVArh)

influxdb_version.title: InfluxDB version
influxdb_version.description: Pick which InfluxDB you're connecting to. Choose 1 for the Home Assistant InfluxDB add-on, or 2 for InfluxDB 2.x / Cloud.

data_description.token: InfluxDB API token with write access.

influxdb_config_v1.title: InfluxDB connection
influxdb_config_v1.description: Connection details for the Home Assistant InfluxDB add-on (InfluxDB 1.x).

data_description.database: InfluxDB database name (the add-on default is homeassistant).
data_description.username: InfluxDB username from the add-on's logins.

error.unknown_database: Database not found on the InfluxDB server

create_entry.influxdb_verified: InfluxDB connection verified. Found {count} existing data points.

backfill.title: Backfill from a date
backfill.description: Re-fetches every routed measurement for every usage point from the chosen date up to now. Runs in the background; check the Home Assistant log for progress.

configure_measurements.title: Configure measurements
configure_measurements.description: For {naziv} ({identifikator}) — pick any combination of Statistics and InfluxDB per reading type.

sync_schedule.description: When enabled, readings are fetched once a day at this local time.
